qas.q: A security attack is defined as which of the following?
qas.a: An event that has been identified by correlation and analytics tools as a malicious activity.

qas.q: Which order does a typical compliance process follow?
qas.a: Establish scope, readiness assessment, gap remediation, testing/auditing, management reporting

qas.q: Under GDPR who determines the purpose and means of processing of personal data?
Under the International Organization for Standardization (ISO) which standard focuses on Privacy?
Which SOC report is closest to an ISO report?
What is an auditor looking for when they test control the control for implementation over an entire offering with no gaps?
The HIPAA Security Rule requires covered entities to maintain which three (3) reasonable safeguards for protecting e-PHI?
HIPAA Administrative safeguards include which two (2) of the following?
qas.a:
Workforce training and management
Security Personnel

qas.q: Who is the governing entity for HIPAA?
qas.a:
NOT US Legislature

NOT Department of Homeland Security

NOT Cyber Security and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA)

US Department of Health and Human Services Office of Civil Rights

qas.q: HIPAA Physical safeguards include which two (2) of the following?
qas.a:
Facility Access and Control
Workstation and Device Security

qas.q: PCI uses which three (3) of the following Card Holder Data Environment categories to determine scope?
qas.a:
0.5 People ---
0.5 Technology---
Processes (correct then i guess)
Governance ---
